summary: Mobile adaptation testing completed for TechnicalReports.jsx (OTs page). All 4 tabs (Clientes, OTs, Estados, PCs) are properly adapted for mobile viewport (375x800). The implementation correctly uses the useMobile hook from MobileContext.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests.description: Header shows 'OTs' instead of full 'OTs - Ordens de Trabalho' on mobile viewport
All 4 tabs (Clientes, OTs, Estados, PCs) are visible in horizontal scrolling tab bar
Client cards display properly with Ver/Editar/Eliminar buttons accessible. Cards show email, phone, truncated info
OT cards display OT number (#360), status badge (Em Execução), client name, and equipment. Cards are single-column grid on mobile
Dropdown is 309px wide (full width minus padding) on 375px viewport. Status filter works correctly showing results
Pedidos de Cotação cards display PC number, status, OT reference, client name, materials count with PDF/Email action buttons
Modal opens with full-width stacked form fields (Cliente, Data de Início, Local, etc.) properly adapted for mobile
Modal opens with stacked form fields (Nome, NIF, Email, Telefone, Morada, Emails Adicionais)

passed_tests.test: OT view modal - legible and navigable
passed_tests.description: OT view modal opens with scrollable content showing client data, cronómetros, registos de mão de obra
'Nova OT' and 'Novo Cliente' buttons span 309px (full width minus padding) on mobile
Bottom navigation visible with Início, OTs, Calendário, Menu tabs. Remains visible after scrolling
Client details modal shows all info with action buttons (Adicionar Relatório, Ver Relatórios, Ver Equipamentos, etc.)

seed_data_creation: Used existing data - 7 OT cards visible, multiple client cards, 2 PCs visible

horizontal_tabs.styling: flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto pb-2 -mx-4 px-4 scrollbar-hide

modals.view_ot: Scrollable content with all OT details
modals.view_cliente: Full client details with action buttons

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile adaptations for TechnicalReports.jsx are fully functional. The useMobile hook from MobileContext correctly detects mobile viewport and applies responsive styling. All 4 tabs (Clientes, OTs, Estados, PCs) work correctly on 375x800 viewport. Modals are mobile-friendly with stacked form fields. Bottom navigation remains visible. Minor console warning about DialogContent missing aria-describedby - this is an accessibility improvement suggestion, not a bug.
